question: What did Asfandiar first say or do when he saw you?
answer: He was so happy and so excited to see me alive. He hugged me and I hugged his legs, and I started crying,I am thirsty  Told him I am thirsty, hungry, and tired. He run to the kind of spring, small one to get me someone water and all was kind of muddy and dirty, but really I didn't mind. I drank it.
